history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

Two young boys, likely brothers, are the subjects of this close-up photograph. The boy on the left, slightly older, is positioned in the foreground, looking directly at the camera with a serious expression. He's wearing dark, wrap-around sunglasses that obscure his eyes and a light-colored, checkered button-up shirt. The boy on the right, younger, is seated next to him, also wearing dark sunglasses and a similar checkered shirt. His gaze is directed slightly off-camera, with his mouth slightly ajar.

The background is somewhat cluttered and out of focus, suggesting an indoor or covered outdoor setting. A purple bicycle with a white seat is visible behind the boys, partially obscured by them. To the right of the bicycle, a colorful, patterned fabric or textile is draped, featuring a grid of orange and yellow squares with smaller black crosses within them. A white, curved object, possibly part of another bicycle or a piece of equipment, is visible on the far right.

The lighting appears to be natural and somewhat diffused, casting soft shadows. The color palette is dominated by the muted tones of the boys' shirts and the darker shades of their sunglasses, contrasted with the brighter, warmer colors in the background textile and the purple of the bicycle. The overall mood is casual and a little playful, with the sunglasses adding a touch of "cool" to the young subjects. The image has a slightly grainy, vintage quality, possibly due to the camera or processing used.
